from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)

def status(iso):
    exp = datetime.fromisoformat(iso)
    if exp.tzinfo is None:
        exp = exp.replace(tzinfo=timezone.utc)
    return "refresh" if exp < datetime.now(timezone.utc) else "valid"
print(status((now - timedelta(hours=1)).isoformat()))
print(status((now + timedelta(hours=1)).isoformat()))

from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta
now = datetime.now(timezone.utc)
print(now < now - timedelta(seconds=1))

import re
pat = r"^[^@]+@[^@]+\.[^@]+$"
print(bool(re.match(pat, "ana@example.pe")))
print(bool(re.match(pat, "bad")))

a, b = "ana.rojas@example.pe", "ana.rojas@example.com"
n = 0
for x, y in zip(a, b):
    if x != y:
        break
    n += 1
print(round(n / max(len(a), len(b)), 2), "match_no_es_fraude")
exercises.justification_from_packet: Hints prefix score + note not fraud.

exercises.code: print(list(dict.fromkeys(["a@x", "b@x", "a@x"])))

rows = [("a@example.pe", "to"), ("b@other.test", "cc")]
out = [(em, "bcc" if em.endswith("other.test") else role) for em, role in rows]
print(sum(1 for _, role in out if role in ("to", "cc")))

log = []
log.append({"from": "pending", "to": "approved", "actor": "rev1"})
print(log)

import hashlib
print(hashlib.sha256(b"run|to|v1").hexdigest()[:8])

audit, store = [], {}

def create(key):
    if key in store:
        audit.append("retry_hit")
        return store[key]
    store[key] = "d001"
    audit.append("create")
    return store[key]
create("k")
create("k")
print(audit)
